attrs.license: ESA CCI Data Policy: free and open access
attrs.project: Climate Change Initiative - European Space Agency
attrs.references: Algorithm Theoretical Basis Document (ATBD),Product User Guide (PUG), see https://climate.esa.int/en/projects/precursors-for-aerosols-and-ozone/
attrs.source: Product generated with MOPITT v9T and IASI multiplatform carbon monoxide (CO)
attrs.standard_name_vocabulary: NetCDF Climate and Forecast (CF) Metadata Convention version 80, 7 February 2022
attrs.summary: The ESA Climate Change Initiative (CCI) carbon monoxide (CO) Climate Data Record (CDR) merged product is a Level 3 CO product developed by merging satellite data from IASI (on METOP-A, B, and C) and MOPITT (on TERRA).
attrs.title: Monthly carbon monoxide (CO) CCI+ IASI MOPITT L3 merged product

attrs.comment: daytime observations are observations associated with solar zenithal angle lower than 90 degrees
attrs.long_name: monthly merged IASI MOPITT total carbon monoxide columns for daytime observations

attrs.comment: nighttime observations are observations associated with solar zenithal angle higher or equal to 90 degrees
attrs.long_name: monthly merged IASI MOPITT total carbon monoxide columns for nighttime observations

attrs.comment: daytime observations are observations associated with solar zenithal angle lower than 90 degrees
attrs.long_name: uncertainty in monthly merged IASI MOPITT total carbon monoxide columns for daytime observations

attrs.comment: nighttime observations are observations associated with solar zenithal angle higher or equal to 90 degrees
attrs.long_name: uncertainty in monthly merged IASI MOPITT total carbon monoxide columns for nighttime observations

attrs.comment: unitless. Daytime observations are observations associated with solar zenithal angle lower than 90 degrees
attrs.long_name: flag for instruments used in the weighted average, for daytime observations: 3 for IASI and MOPITT, 2 for IASI only, 1 for MOPITT only and 0 when no data

attrs.comment: unitless. Nighttime observations are observations associated with solar zenithal angle higher or equal to 90 degrees
attrs.long_name: flag for instruments used in the weighted average, for nighttime observations: 3 for IASI and MOPITT, 2 for IASI only, 1 for MOPITT only and 0 when no data

attrs.comment: daytime observations are observations associated with solar zenithal angle higher or equal to 90 degrees; only cloud free data are used
attrs.long_name: altitude of the surface for IASI daytime observations

attrs.comment: nighttime observations are observations associated with solar zenithal angle higher or equal to 90 degrees; only cloud free data are used
attrs.long_name: altitude of the surface for IASI nighttime observations
